title: Relics And Alchemy
description: make your original Item, Entity on Alchemy!
body:
# Relic And Alchemy

![Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/6n5qmd8S/images/e2f5510a7e012cc34e88e3a952337cfffc03eeaa.png) ### Summary This mod is Adds a combinable alchemy system and Relics... Which is inspired ealry minecraft cauldron brewing system! You can put material ever you want... and Finally, add items that suit your needs (such as glass bottle. or clay ball!) and yay! you make own item! make potion, projectile... even golem! ### First Step First. You need place cauldron put Wooden Shovel in the cauldron don't forget put campfire under the cauldron and put water! If you want those to back normal cauldron. break! If more Infomation see this https://github.com/baguchan/RelicsAndAlchemy/wiki ### ProTip The order in which you place items is important. It will great affect "power" balance... ### For Developer or Modpacker you can make add own material with datapack! If you want more info See this! https://github.com/baguchan/RelicsAndAlchemy/wiki/For-Developer-and-Modpacker   ### Planned Feature combine Archeology item and make new mob   ### Credit kurobell - helped idea!
